prompt: Luxury natural skincare and beauty advertisement poster in a sun-dappled forest setting, vertical composition. A young woman is centered in the background from chest up, wearing a thin beige camisole, with tousled blonde hair styled in a loose side braid over her left shoulder, softly backlit by warm morning sunlight. Her face is obscured by a solid rectangular block in a medium tan color. She gently holds a small sprig of delicate white wildflowers near her chin. The background is a dreamy woodland with tall blurred tree trunks, soft green foliage, creamy bokeh, and a serene botanical atmosphere. In the foreground, 5 beauty products are arranged in a neat row on a mossy log with bits of greenery and tiny white flowers: 1) a green glass dropper bottle with a black pipette cap and bamboo collar labeled “WILLOW & ROOT” and “ORGANIC FACE OIL” with small text “NOURISH + GLOW” and “30 ml e 1 fl oz”; 2) a round cosmetic jar angled slightly upward with a pale beige lid and dusty rose label reading “WILLOW & ROOT” and “CREAM BLUSH” with small text “BEAUTY FROM NATURE”; 3) a tinted lip balm stick in muted terracotta packaging labeled “WILLOW & ROOT” and “TINTED LIP BALM” with small text “TREAT + TINT”; 4) a frosted light sage pump bottle with bamboo pump cap labeled “WILLOW & ROOT” and “DEWY SERUM” with small text “HYDRATE + RENEW” and “30 ml e 1 fl oz”; 5) a round bamboo compact standing upright on the right labeled “WILLOW & ROOT” and “BAMBOO COMPACT” with small text “NATURAL PERFECTION.” At the top, large elegant dark green high-fashion serif typography reads Rooted in Radiance on two lines, with the smaller uppercase sans-serif tagline below reading Nature-Powered. Skin-Loving.. A thin horizontal divider line with a small two-leaf icon sits under the tagline. On the upper left-middle is a dark olive green circular badge with a fine border and a leaf icon, containing the text “PLANT-BASED + CRUELTY FREE.” On the upper right-middle is a beige circular promotional badge with serif text reading “15% OFF” and smaller text “FIRST ORDER.” Brand identity on all products reads WILLOW & ROOT. Use an earthy palette of olive green, beige, bamboo wood, cream, blush pink, and golden sunlight. Premium clean beauty campaign aesthetic, photorealistic product photography, soft focus background, crisp labels, editorial wellness ad styling, natural textures, subtle glow, polished commercial composition. Add a small translucent app watermark in the top-right corner reading Pollo AI GPT Image 2.
